title: The Tiger
overview: Tells the story of a family of silat fighters living in a small village. They have long kept the secret of their tiger- style martial art, a tradition passed down through generations within the family. However, a minor incident at the local market, caught on video and going viral, begins to reveal their once-hidden tiger-style silat to the public. This exposed secret captures the attention of an outsider who becomes obsessed with the tiger-style martial art. Together with his followers, he is determined to track down the tiger-style fighter, aiming to seize the key to this legendary martial art.
